name: @tank/bulletproof
description: Build it right, prove it works, ship with confidence. Combines intent-driven development (@tank/idd) with real-system E2E testing (@tank/bdd-e2e-testing) so nothing ships without being defined and verified against real dependencies. No mocks. No guessing. Triggers: bulletproof, ship with confidence, intent and testing, define and verify, intent to tests, verified development, build right ship fast, no mocks, real system testing, full development workflow, intent verified.
